司令官様……。<br>たまには、私の悩みも聞いていただけますか？: Lord Commander... Would you listen to my troubles for once?
私、ここで皆さんの心に寄り添い、神様の言葉を伝えるのは、<br>とても尊いお務め:
I believe that being here to comfort others and convey God's word is
a truly noble duty.
でも……少し罪深い告白をしても、よろしいでしょうか？<br>私、時々、神様のあり:
But... may I make a somewhat sinful confession? Sometimes, more than
the Lord's precious words...
司令官様が話す、あまり上品でないくだらない冗談を聞いているほうが、<br>ずっと:
Lord Commander, there are times when listening to the crude, silly
jokes you tell sets my heart far more at ease.
はっ……！ 神に仕える身にあるまじき言葉でした！<br>い、今のは聞かなかったこ:
Ah...! That was a most improper thing for a servant of the Lord to
say! P-please pretend you did not hear that.
